meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Overwhelmed by AI tools? Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code checklist to ship high-quality client apps faster. Beginner-friendly guide.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. The Antigravity project template centralizes your architecture, while Claude Code automates the heavy lifting. By standardizing your boilerplate and using agentic CLI workflows, you cut development time by 70%, allowing you to focus on high-value client features rather than managing complex AI tool sprawl.
content.intro:
The modern freelance developer is drowning. Between the endless stream of LLM wrappers, shifting frameworks, and the constant pressure to ship, the 'AI advantage' has ironically become your biggest bottleneck. You aren't building; you are managing a chaotic ecosystem of disconnected scripts and half-baked prototypes.

But there is an exit ramp. The Antigravity project template acts as a structural anchor, providing a battle-tested foundation that integrates seamlessly with Claude Code. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about reclaiming your mental bandwidth to deliver professional, enterprise-grade software for your clients without the burnout.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Initialize your project with a standardized structure to ensure consistency across all client work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project structure using the Antigravity boilerplate, including authentication, database schema, and standard API routes.

steps.title: Configure Agentic Context
steps.description: Feed your project architecture into Claude Code so the agent understands your specific folder constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .claudeignore and system prompt file that defines the project's coding standards and file structure conventions.

steps.title: Implement Feature Sprints
steps.description: Use agentic commands to build specific functional modules while maintaining codebase integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new CRUD module for user profiles, adhering to the project's existing TypeScript interfaces and Prisma schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement user profile CRUD with server-side validation'

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing
steps.description: Leverage the agent to write tests immediately after feature completion to ensure client-ready stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Vitest suites for the newly created profile module, covering edge cases and error states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for src/modules/profile'

steps.title: Refactor and Optimize
steps.description: Perform a final codebase scan to ensure clean code principles and optimal performance before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for technical debt and suggest refactoring for better modularity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor codebase for clean architecture and performance'

pro_tips: Always maintain a local 'Context.md' file that Claude Code can reference; it prevents the AI from hallucinating file paths.
Use git branches for every agentic command to ensure you can revert if an AI-generated refactor breaks your core logic.
Create a custom 'Antigravity CLI' alias in your Zshrc to trigger your most frequent project setup commands in one keystroke.
Force the AI to use specific libraries by adding a 'Tech Stack' section to your project's .claude/config file.
Never ship AI code without a manual 'human-in-the-loop' review of the diffs; treat the AI as a junior dev, not a lead architect.
content.next_steps: Once your template is live, integrate a CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments, ensuring your client receives a production-ready URL every time you merge.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the tools and start mastering the architecture. You have the blueprint, the agent, and the strategy to dominate your freelance niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
